reviews.review_description: Yoi kinda good at making the game but its trash i cant even play and i know your a youtuber

I gave this game at four. It is good at all, but it’s just that every time I spawn and now I can’t even get in. It just makes me fall out of the map and it kicks me which I’m kind of sad about I didn’t get to play the game it looks like a really good game even though I can’t really see anything I really wanna play if you can really update it where I don’t fall out of the map I will really appreciate it and make a five star review ￼￼

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear that you have issues while playing. Im trying to fix it soon as possible.

reviews.review_description: I just spawn and get kicked
